scenario: Mixed equipment — one request needs both flatbed and van trailers
subject: Mixed Load Quote - 2 Different Equipment Types
body:
Hi Jillian,

I have a customer moving their manufacturing line from Milwaukee, WI to Louisville, KY and we need two types of equipment:

1) One flatbed for the heavy machinery (CNC milling machine) — approximately 48,000 lbs. This piece is oversized at 12ft wide so we'll need permits.

2) Two dry vans for the tooling, raw materials, and inventory — each about 30,000 lbs.

Pickup: April 21, 2026 (all three trucks same day)
Delivery: April 23, 2026

The machinery requires top-loading with a crane at origin. Crane is provided by the shipper.

Please quote all three trucks.

Karen Olsen
NorthStar Logistics
(414) 555-0321

expected_extraction.commodity: CNC milling machine, tooling, raw materials, inventory
expected_extraction.special_requirements: Oversized load (12ft wide) — permits needed, Top-loading with crane at origin (crane provided by shipper)

notes: Mixed equipment complicates extraction — equipment_type confidence may be lower. Agent may want to split into two RFQs or capture both types.
